title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: server.py:6-7 imports pandas and mcp.server.FastMCP, but no requirements.txt/pyproject.toml/setup.py exists in run_dir (ls shows none)
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt or pyproject.toml pinning pandas and mcp so the server and tests are reproducibly installable

title: BR-Football-Dataset.csv loaded but excluded from combined match queries
evidence: data_loader.py:199-227 all_matches() concatenates brasileirao/copa/libertadores/historico only; store.br_football (load_br_football, data_loader.py:106) is loaded and tested but never merged
suggestion: Either merge br_football into all_matches() or document that it is intentionally separate; otherwise its 10k matches are not reachable via match-query tools

title: Team filtering uses substring matching and can over-match
evidence: server.py:31-34 _filter_team uses str.contains(team.lower()); a query that is a substring of another normalized team name matches both (e.g. 'Atletico' matches both 'Atletico Mineiro' and 'Athletico Paranaense')
suggestion: Offer an exact/normalized-equality match option or anchor the match to whole team names to avoid false positives

title: Tools return preformatted strings rather than structured data
evidence: All @app.tool handlers in server.py return '\n'.join(lines) text (e.g. server.py:130, 211, 286)
suggestion: Returning structured dicts/JSON would let the calling LLM compose results more reliably; current design is acceptable for a demo MCP server
